title: Capture API + capture screen
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want a one-purpose capture surface so that saving a thought is a single screen, not a chat turn.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/routes/api/capture/+server.ts: POST { text, source? } calls graphiti add_episode synchronously and returns 200 with the episode id once extraction completes
New file pwa/src/routes/capture/+page.svelte: big textarea, Send button, 'captured' toast on response
No queue, no spool — wait for the Graphiti round-trip is acceptable for the Phase 2 smoke test (Phase 3 introduces the async path when iOS Shortcut forces it)
Verify: from phone, type a thought, tap send, see 'captured' toast within ~3s; the same thought appears in /browse and via search_brain
